lines.english: The Ambrosial Naam, the Giver of Peace, abides within my mind.
Serving the Guru, I have come to understand myself.
Imbued with the Naam, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||5||
By Guru's Grace, perform good deeds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਾਏ ਤਾ ਕੋ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: meraa prabh laae taa ko laagai |
lines.english: When my God attaches someone to Him, only then is that person attached.
Conquering ego, he remains awake to the Word of the Shabad.
Night and day, I am imbued with the Word of the Guru's Bani, and the Naam. ||6||
Here and hereafter, he enjoys lasting peace. ||7||
The filthy self-willed manmukh does not understand the Shabad.
The fickle mind does not know the way.
The Gurmukh chants the Immaculate Naam. ||8||
that I might dwell in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
I offer my prayer to the Lord,

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਦੁਖ ਕਾਟੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: kilavikh dukh kaatte har naam pragaas |9|
lines.english: There, sins and sufferings are erased, and one is illumined with the Lord's Name. ||9||
Through the Word of the True Guru, I recognize the One Lord.
In reflective meditation, I have come to love good conduct.
Aasaa, First Mehl:
O Nanak, my mind is imbued with the Lord's Name. ||10||7||
The mind of the faithless cynic is like a crazy elephant.
It wanders around the forest, distracted by attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਤ ਉਤ ਜਾਹਿ ਕਾਲ ਕੇ ਚਾਪੇ ॥
lines.translit: eit ut jaeh kaal ke chaape |
lines.english: It goes here and there, hounded by death.
The Gurmukh seeks, and finds his own home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਵਰ ਤਿਆਗਹੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਉਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: simarahu raam naam at niramal avar tiaagahu haumai kauraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Remember in meditation the Lord's Name, the most pure and sublime; renounce your bitter egotism. ||1||Pause||
Without the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the mind finds no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਮਝੇ ਜਮ ਕਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਹਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin samajhe jam kaa dukh sahasee |
lines.english: Without understanding, it shall suffer the pains of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਕਿਉ ਰਹਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man mugadh kahahu kiau rahasee |
lines.english: Tell me, how can this stupid mind be rescued?
The Lord Himself forgives us, and unites us with the True Guru.
The True Lord conquers and overcomes the tortures of death. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਕਰਮਾ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਰਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man karamaa ihu man dharamaa |
lines.english: This mind commits its deeds of karma, and this mind follows the Dharma.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਪੰਚ ਤਤੁ ਤੇ ਜਨਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man panch tat te janamaa |
lines.english: This mind is born of the five elements.
This foolish mind is perverted and greedy.
Chanting the Naam, the mind of the Gurmukh becomes beautiful. ||3||
The mind of the Gurmukh finds the Lord's home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਜੋਗੀ ਭੋਗੀ ਤਪੁ ਤਾਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man jogee bhogee tap taapai |
lines.english: This mind is a Yogi, an enjoyer, a practicer of austerities.
The Gurmukh understands the Lord God Himself. ||4||
The Gurmukh comes to know the three worlds.
Desire and duality afflict each and every heart.
The Gurmukh drinks in the Lord's sublime essence;
This mind is a detached renunciate, forsaking egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਮਹਲੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: dar ghar mahalee har pat raakhai |5|
lines.english: at His Door, in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, He preserves his honor. ||5||
This mind is the king, the hero of cosmic battles.
The mind of the Gurmukh becomes fearless through the Naam.
holding ego in its grip, it confines them to one place. ||6||
Overpowering and subduing the five passions,
The Gurmukh renounces other songs and tastes.
The mind of the Gurmukh is awakened to devotion.
Understanding itself, this soul becomes attuned to the Formless Lord. ||7||
Hearing the unstruck music of the sound current, this mind contemplates the Shabad, and accepts it.
The Gurmukh shows his love through loving devotional worship.
Night and day, by Guru's Grace, sing the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਦਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man niramal dar ghar soee |
lines.english: This mind becomes immaculately pure, in the Court and the Home of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਦਿ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt so prabh aad jugaad |8|
lines.english: God dwells in each and every heart, since the very beginning of time, and throughout the ages. ||8||
This mind is intoxicated with the sublime essence of the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਕੇ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸਾ ॥੯॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak har jan ke daasan daasaa |9|8|
lines.english: Nanak is the humble servant of the slave of the Lord's slaves. ||9||8||
The Gurmukh realizes the essence of totality.
For the sake of devotional worship, he dwells at the Guru's Feet.
